name: Pork Chops on Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown pork chops on both sides and season with salt and pepper.
2. Place rice in a 12x7 inch baking dish.
3. Pour orange juice over the rice.
4. Arrange pork chops on top of the rice.
5. Pour chicken soup over everything.
6. Cover and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
7. Uncover and bake for another 10 minutes.
8. Serves 6.
